chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-2140 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.8557/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 3. For orders on CMA No.8558/2025 (Ex/A) 4. For orders on CMA No.8559/2025 (S/A) 5. For hearing of main case 22.12.2025 Mr. Aamir Ali Bhutto, Advocate for petitioner ************** 1. Granted. 2to5. Learned counsel submits that the petitioner intends to approach the appropriate forum/Sindh Service Tribunal Karachi for redressal of his grievance. In view of this, he does not press the present Constitution Petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed, along with all pending application(s). J U D G E J U D G E M.Ali*
